subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Baron Call  at sea, 1913-12-03
subcodes.first_line: You must sow seeds of the trees of which may yield fruits for all eternity. Praise be to God, you have entered in the path
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @bringing forth results; fruit, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
